appraisal_events.evidence: « Peut-on entrer ? … je venais voir si tu ne voulais pas que nous allions dîner quelque part ensemble… » … « il n’est breuvage si funeste qui ne puisse à certaines heures devenir précieux et réconfortant… »
appraisal_events.explanation: Marsantes arrives unexpectedly and offers companionship and care; despite the narrator’s general skepticism about friendship, he concedes that at such an hour it becomes precious and comforting. This locally elevates Marsantes as a considerate, helpful presence.

status_effects.explanation: He is framed more favorably in this moment as the friend whose considerate offer brings needed warmth and support.
